reviews.review_description: Had a great time playing this and it left my throwing arm tired for a few days after playing. I can imagine a multiplayer version of this being super competetive, I already felt compelled compete on the scoreboards.

reviews.review_title: A special and unique mixed reality sport
reviews.review_description: I've said this before and it applies to the newest offering from Arcadia. This is fun. It's intuitive, immersive and accessible. I've been enjoying this on my Quest 2 and it runs very well. Try it, play around with the mechanics, especially with the multiplayer.

very much like the idea. has a really neat looking mixed reality mode. the dodgeball game is fun. for me thow the hand tracking mechanism didn't work well. aiming with the directory of my paw felt weird. the ball flew away occasionally before i opened my hand.
since we players who are into vr sports games all have controller straps anyway, it would be great if the game would offer controller support, so we could do a natural throwing motion 🙏
